LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CINDY ROBISON'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER REQUIRING THE PLAINTIFF TO COMPLY WITH THE DEFENDANT'S CCP 724.050 DEMAND AND FOR PAYMENT OF SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. MANDATORY SANCTIONS OF $100 AND REASONABLE FEES AND COSTS OF $490 ARE AWARDED. GOOD CAUSE SHOWN FOR THE MOTION AND NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2013 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-26-2012 Continued To Jan-29-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For An Order Requiring The Pltf To Comply With The Deft'S Demand And For Payment Of Sanctions And Pos
Off Calendar Oct-16-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT CINDY ROBISON'S Motion For An Order Requiring The Plaintiff To Comply With The Defendant's ccp 724.050 Demand And For Payment Of Sanctions is granted. Mandatory sanctions of $100 and reasonable fees and costs of $490 are awarded. Good cause shown for the motion and no opposition was filed. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
